error.title: Something went wrong...
error.description: It would seem the website encountered an unexcepted error. If it happens again, don't hesitate to report it.

messages.unauthorized: The access to this resource has expired. Reload the page to get the access again.
messages.generic: The access to this resource is not possible. The server returned an error with status code {{statusCode}}.

withNetwork.noNetwork: The content of this page needs an internet connection, and it would seem you are offline... Try to reconnect to get the access.

notFound.title: Resource not found
notFound.description: This URL does not exist. You must have gotten lost...

utils.apiFetch: Fetching data from the database... Please wait few seconds.
utils.redirecting: Please wait, you will be redirected in few seconds...
